mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `group` (group_name, group_id, creator_id, members, member_count, avatar_url, description, created_at, updated_at, status) VALUES (#{groupName}, #{groupId}, #{userId}, #{members}, 1, #{avatarUrl}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW(), 'NORMAL')
INSERT INTO group_member (group_id, user_id, role, joined_at, updated_at, status) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userId}, #{role}, NOW(), NOW(), 'NORMAL')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (message_id, type, from_user_id, to_target_id, to_target_type, text_content, client_timestamp, server_timestamp, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (CONCAT('msg_', REPLACE(UUID(), '-', '')), 'text', #{userId}, #{groupId}, 'group', #{message}, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW())*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW())*1000, 'success', NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT u.* FROM user u JOIN group_member gu ON u.user_id = gu.user_id WHERE gu.group_id = #{groupId} AND gu.status = 'NORMAL'

SELECT g.group_id, g.group_name as groupName, g.creator_id as creatorId, g.member_count as memberCount, g.avatar_url as avatarUrl, g.description FROM `group` g JOIN group_member gm ON g.group_id = gm.group_id WHERE gm.user_id = #{userId} AND gm.status = 'NORMAL' AND g.status = 'NORMAL'
SELECT group_id as groupId, group_name as groupName FROM `group`
SELECT group_id as groupId, group_name as groupName, member_count as memberCount, avatar_url as avatarUrl, description FROM `group`

SELECT m.message_id as messageId, m.type, m.from_user_id as fromUserId, m.to_target_id as groupId, m.text_content as textContent, m.image_urls as imageUrls, m.file_urls as fileUrls, m.file_name as fileName, m.file_size as fileSize, m.client_timestamp as clientTimestamp, m.server_timestamp as serverTimestamp, m.status, m.quote_message_id as quoteMessageId, m.quote_message_sender_name as quoteMessageSenderName, m.create_time as createTime, m.update_time as updateTime, u.user_name as userName, u.avatar_url as userAvatarUrl FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.from_user_id = u.user_id WHERE m.to_target_id = #{groupId} AND m.to_target_type = 'group' ORDER BY m.server_timestamp ASC

SELECT u.user_id as userId, u.user_name as userName, u.avatar_url as avatarUrl, gm.role as role FROM user u JOIN group_member gm ON u.user_id = gm.user_id WHERE gm.group_id = #{groupId} AND gm.status = 'NORMAL' ORDER BY CASE gm.role WHEN 'OWNER' THEN 1 WHEN 'ADMIN' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END
